title: asterolasia rupestris subsp. rupestris
intro: Asterolasia rupestris subsp. rupestris, also known as the rocky asterolasia or rock asterolasia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the eastern coast of Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Asterolasia rupestris subsp. rupestris include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to the lack of extensive scientific research on its safety and efficacy.
